intro: A senior FCA official has called for the UK to directly regulate general-purpose AI models like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini due to their influence on financial decisions. A Scottish village's proposed AI datacentre faces mounting controversy after revelations that the government and developers privately acknowledged the site cannot meet its renewable energy commitments by 2030. Apple has integrated AI capabilities into watchOS 27's developer beta, enabling conversation continuity between iPhones and Apple Watches.

whitelist.title: AI - Business Insider
whitelist.desc: Explore cutting-edge AI insights and trends with Business Insider's dedicated artificial intelligence coverage. Stay ahead with in-depth articles, expert analyses, and the latest news on AI technologies shaping industries worldwide.
